actionTitle.message: Open the NotebookLM Source Management launcher

extDesc.message: Folder and drag-and-drop sorting for the NotebookLM sources panel.

popup_launcher_note.message: Works inside NotebookLM's source panel. The toolbar icon is a launcher.

popup_title_ready.message: Source manager is ready in this notebook

popup_body_ready.message: Use the button below to scroll to the manager and highlight it inside NotebookLM.

popup_title_notebook_home.message: Open a notebook to use this extension

popup_body_notebook_home.message: You are in NotebookLM, but not inside a specific notebook yet. Open one notebook, then use this launcher again.

popup_title_notebook_home_new_tab.message: Open NotebookLM in a new tab

popup_body_notebook_home_new_tab.message: You are already on the NotebookLM home page. This launcher will open a new NotebookLM tab so the click has a clear result.

popup_title_switch_notebook.message: Switch to your open NotebookLM notebook

popup_body_switch_notebook.message: A NotebookLM notebook is already open in another tab. Use the button below to switch there first.

popup_title_external_page.message: Go to NotebookLM to use the source manager

popup_body_external_page.message: This extension does not open a separate toolbar app. Its manager appears inside an open NotebookLM notebook.

popup_title_refresh_needed.message: This notebook is open, but the manager is not attached

popup_body_refresh_needed.message: Refresh this notebook and reopen the launcher. If it still fails, NotebookLM's page structure may have changed.

popup_reason_source_panel_missing.message: NotebookLM's source panel could not be found on this page.

popup_reason_panel_header_missing.message: The source panel was found, but the manager could not be attached to its header.

popup_reason_manager_not_ready.message: The manager is still loading on this page.

popup_reason_notebook_missing.message: Open a NotebookLM notebook page to access the source manager.

popup_reason_generic.message: The source manager is not available on this page yet.

popup_error_invalid_storage_key.message: The source manager could not access its saved state on this page.

ui_no_tags_for_source.message: Create tags to assign them to this source.

ui_no_matching_sources.message: No sources match the current filters.

ui_tag_delete_confirm.message: Delete tag "$1"? It will be removed from all sources.

ui_empty_folders.message:
No folders available yet.
Create one first.

ui_delete_group_confirm_non_empty.message:
The folder "$1" is not empty.

Delete it and move its contents to "$2"?

ui_crash_missing_header.message: Initialization failed. Could not locate the source panel header.

ui_crash_missing_panel.message: Could not find NotebookLM's source panel. Google may have updated the page structure.

ui_crash_init_error.message: Initialization error. Check the console for details.
